feature_gaps.name: Multi-Agent Prompt Optimization
feature_gaps.description: No tool provides end-to-end prompt optimization specifically for multi-agent systems. MASS framework exists in research but no productized tool optimizes prompts across agent topologies, handoffs, and inter-agent communication protocols.
feature_gaps.current_coverage: Only DSPy and Opik touch agent-specific optimization; no tool handles multi-agent topology-aware prompt tuning

feature_gaps.name: Multimodal Prompt Optimization
feature_gaps.description: Only 3 of 20 tools (15%) support multimodal prompts. No tool offers optimization specifically for image/video/audio prompts. Research (MPO framework) exists but no productized solution.
feature_gaps.current_coverage: PromptPerfect supports Midjourney, PromptLayer supports vision models, Vertex AI supports multimodal - but none optimize multimodal prompts algorithmically

feature_gaps.name: Prompt Security & Red Teaming as a Service
feature_gaps.description: Only Promptfoo offers red teaming/security testing. No dedicated prompt security optimization tool that helps harden prompts against jailbreaks, injection attacks, and data leakage while maintaining quality.
feature_gaps.current_coverage: Promptfoo has 67+ attack plugins but it's primarily a testing tool, not a security-focused optimizer

feature_gaps.name: Prompt Caching & Cost Optimization
feature_gaps.description: Only Helicone offers response caching (up to 95% cost reduction). No tool combines prompt optimization with cost-aware optimization that recommends shorter/cheaper prompts achieving the same quality.
feature_gaps.current_coverage: Helicone caches responses; some tools track costs - but none optimize prompts to minimize cost while maintaining quality

feature_gaps.name: Automated Regression Testing for Prompts
feature_gaps.description: Only 35% of tools offer regression testing. No tool provides automated continuous prompt regression detection when models update or when prompts change in production.
feature_gaps.current_coverage: Promptfoo, Braintrust, Latitude offer some regression testing but it's manual/semi-automated

feature_gaps.name: Cross-Model Prompt Translation & Portability
feature_gaps.description: No tool automatically translates or optimizes prompts when switching between models (e.g., GPT-4 to Claude to Gemini). Teams must manually rewrite prompts for each model.

feature_gaps.name: Prompt Distillation for Edge/Mobile
feature_gaps.description: Research on prompt distillation exists but no tool compresses complex prompts into token-efficient versions for edge devices or smaller models while preserving intent.

segment_gaps.name: Domain-Specific Prompt Optimization (Healthcare, Legal, Finance)
segment_gaps.description: No prompt optimization tool is tailored for regulated industries. Healthcare needs HIPAA-aware prompt optimization; legal needs compliance-focused prompts; finance needs risk-aware optimization.
segment_gaps.current_coverage: Generic tools exist; domain-specific LLMs exist (Med-PaLM, ChatLAW); but no domain-specific prompt optimization platform

segment_gaps.name: Small Business / Solo Developer Affordable Tier
segment_gaps.description: Pricing gap between free tiers (limited) and paid tiers ($39-250/mo). Small businesses and indie developers need a $10-20/mo tier with meaningful features.
segment_gaps.current_coverage: Free tiers are very limited (5k-50k requests); jump to $39-250/mo is steep for small teams

segment_gaps.name: Non-Technical Business Users
segment_gaps.description: While some tools have no-code editors, no tool provides a fully non-technical prompt optimization workflow with guided wizards, natural language instructions, and business-outcome-focused metrics.
segment_gaps.current_coverage: PromptLayer, Braintrust have no-code editors but still require technical understanding of prompts

workflow_gaps.name: End-to-End Prompt Lifecycle Management
workflow_gaps.description: No single tool covers the full lifecycle: ideation -> authoring -> optimization -> testing -> deployment -> monitoring -> iteration. Teams stitch together 3-5 tools.
workflow_gaps.current_coverage: Braintrust and LangSmith come closest but still lack automated optimization; DSPy optimizes but lacks deployment/monitoring

workflow_gaps.name: Prompt-as-Code GitOps Workflow
workflow_gaps.description: No tool provides a native Git-based prompt management workflow where prompts are treated as code artifacts with branch/merge/PR review, beyond basic versioning.
workflow_gaps.current_coverage: PromptLayer has Git-like versioning but it's not actual Git integration; no PR review workflow for prompts

workflow_gaps.name: Collaborative Prompt Debugging
workflow_gaps.description: No tool enables real-time collaborative debugging of prompts (like Google Docs for prompt engineering) where multiple team members can simultaneously test, annotate, and refine prompts.
workflow_gaps.current_coverage: Tools offer collaboration features but not real-time co-editing or shared debugging sessions

integration_gaps.name: IDE-Native Prompt Engineering
integration_gaps.description: No major tool offers deep IDE integration (VS Code, JetBrains) with inline prompt editing, testing, and optimization without leaving the coding environment.
integration_gaps.current_coverage: Promptfoo has CLI; some tools have SDKs; but no VS Code extension for prompt optimization

integration_gaps.name: Framework-Agnostic Agent Integration
integration_gaps.description: Most optimization tools are tied to specific frameworks (LangSmith to LangChain). No truly framework-agnostic prompt optimization tool works seamlessly with CrewAI, AutoGen, LangGraph, and custom agent frameworks.
integration_gaps.current_coverage: Langfuse and Helicone are more agnostic via OpenTelemetry but lack deep agent optimization

integration_gaps.name: CI/CD Pipeline Deep Integration
integration_gaps.description: Only 35% of tools offer CI/CD integration. No tool provides native GitHub Actions/GitLab CI prompt testing with quality gates that block deployments on prompt regression.
integration_gaps.current_coverage: Promptfoo has GitHub Actions; Braintrust has quality gates; but comprehensive CI/CD for prompts is rare

pricing_gaps.name: Mid-Tier Pricing ($10-30/mo)
pricing_gaps.description: Gap between free tiers and $39-250/mo paid plans. No tool offers a meaningful mid-tier for small teams (2-5 people) doing serious prompt work.
pricing_gaps.current_coverage: Langfuse Core at $29/mo is closest; most tools jump from free to $39-50/user/mo

pricing_gaps.name: Usage-Based Only Pricing
pricing_gaps.description: Most tools charge per-seat. No pure usage-based pricing model where you pay only for prompt optimization runs, not seats.
pricing_gaps.current_coverage: Braintrust charges per GB of tracing; most others are seat-based

pricing_gaps.name: Open Source with Premium Automated Optimization
pricing_gaps.description: Open source tools (Langfuse, Agenta, Latitude) lack automated prompt optimization. Automated optimization tools (DSPy, Braintrust Loop) lack full platform features. No open-source tool with premium auto-optimization add-on.
pricing_gaps.current_coverage: DSPy is open source with optimization but no platform; Langfuse is open source platform but no optimization
